prd.oneLiner: Connect organization goals, key results, owner check-ins, alignment relationships, and performance reporting.
prd.goal: Raise monthly check-in completion for active OKRs to 90% or more.
prd.whyNow: Team goals and execution status live in documents and meeting decks, making priority alignment and risk signals difficult to see.
prd.problem: Team goals and execution status live in documents and meeting decks, making priority alignment and risk signals difficult to see.
prd.solution: Connect organization goals, key results, owner check-ins, alignment relationships, and performance reporting.
prd.alternatives: Email, chat, spreadsheets, and manual ledgers
prd.differentiator: Manage intake, processing, and operations data as one connected source of truth.

targets.name: Team member managing goals and progress
targets.needs: Quickly register needed work and know its status.
targets.pain: Team goals and execution status live in documents and meeting decks, making priority alignment and risk signals difficult to see.

targets.name: Strategy and people operations coordinator
targets.needs: Manage priority and history and review operations metrics.
targets.pain: Team goals and execution status live in documents and meeting decks, making priority alignment and risk signals difficult to see.

scenarios.text: Team member managing goals and progress completes organization, team, and individual okr registration and checks progress.
Strategy and people operations coordinator reviews organization goal attainment, check-in, and alignment reporting.

prd.northStar: Share of operations requests completed on time

kpis.name: On-time processing rate
kpis.target: Raise monthly check-in completion for active OKRs to 90% or more.
kpis.method: Monthly aggregation of completion history against target dates

kpis.name: Operations visibility
kpis.method: Share of registered requests connected to operations reporting

inScope: Organization, team, and individual OKR registration
Goal, key result, alignment, and progress lookup
Goal alignment, check-in, status update, and risk-escalation handling
Organization goal attainment, check-in, and alignment reporting
nonGoals: Replacing adjacent systems such as accounting or payroll
assumptions: User and organization data are available through company SSO.
Operators manage policy and classification criteria.
risks: Weak initial classification can cause incorrect processing.
Stale source data can reduce operational trust.
openQuestions: What defines urgent processing and approval?
What are the post-completion verification and reopen rules?
constraints: State, owner, and priority changes require audit logs.
